scripts.build: npm run -w schemas build && npm run -w server build && npm run -w client build
scripts.build:prod: npm run -w server prisma:generate && npm run build
scripts.tscheck: npm run -w schemas tscheck && npm run -w server tscheck && npm run -w client tscheck
scripts.lint: npm run -w schemas lint && npm run -w server lint && npm run -w client lint
scripts.format: npm run -w schemas format && npm run -w server format && npm run -w client format
